query: My daughter is 3 years old. I want to build a ₹30 lakh corpus for her higher education over the next 15 years. What is the best investment approach?

strategies.name: Equity SIP (12% CAGR est.)

notes: Annual tax saving ~₹14,400 under old regime

best_strategy.name: ELSS SIP (80C tax saving)

response:
